name: Free Pawn
description_short: Free Pawn is a pawn shop in Miami, FL offering collateral-based loans and buying/selling of items like jewelry and electronics.
description_long: Free Pawn operates as a traditional pawn shop located in Miami, Florida's Allapattah neighborhood. The business is positioned within the consumer services sector and serves the local community through standard pawn shop operations. Based on the available information, Free Pawn provides collateral-based lending services typical of pawn shops, where customers can leverage personal items as security for short-term loans. The shop maintains consistent operating hours throughout the week, opening at 8:30 AM on weekdays and 9:30 AM on weekends, with closing time at 4:30 PM daily. Free Pawn's business model centers on the traditional pawn transaction: customers bring items of value (commonly jewelry, electronics, and other merchandise) and receive immediate cash loans based on the item's assessed worth. The company can be reached by phone at (305) 836-9956 for inquiries about specific items or loan terms. Their physical location at 8750 NW 27th Ave provides accessibility to the local Miami market. Without detailed service descriptions from their website, the exact range of items accepted and specific loan terms remain unclear from the available sourced information.
pros: Located in accessible Miami neighborhood with specific street address
Consistent operating hours seven days a week for customer convenience
Direct phone line available for customer inquiries and valuations
Established business with Yahoo Local listing and online presence
Same-day cash availability typical of pawn shop transactions
cons: Website content is minimal and lacks detailed service descriptions or loan terms
No information provided about interest rates, loan duration, or fee structure
Limited online presence beyond basic directory listing with no detailed policies
No customer reviews or ratings visible in provided sourced content
Website URL (uwebconnect.com) appears to be a generic platform without company-specific information
best_for: Customers seeking immediate cash loans using personal collateral
Miami residents needing quick access to funds without credit checks
Individuals looking to buy or sell jewelry and electronics locally
diagnosis: Free Pawn is best suited for Miami-area consumers needing emergency cash quickly through collateral-based lending without credit evaluation. The main caveat is the complete absence of disclosed terms, rates, or fees on any accessible materials, making it impossible to assess whether this option is competitively priced or borrower-friendly compared to alternatives.
